raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box (leftmost) has at least 10 cm of free space on its left and right sides for the two end-effectors to approach. The black cup in front of the lighter box is far enough to avoid collision with the arms while reaching for the darker box.",
    "Postcondition": "Both claws securely hold the darker box from its lateral sides, lifting it slightly off the tabletop so the robot has full control of the box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box (leftmost) has at least 10 cm of free space on its left and right sides for the two end-effectors to approach. The black cup in front of the lighter box is far enough to avoid collision with the arms while reaching for the darker box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both claws securely hold the darker box from its lateral sides, lifting it slightly off the tabletop so the robot has full control of the box.
